news.title: A Camp Randall commencement
news.summary_en: Tears of joy, words of advice and some jumping around mark Saturday's ceremony.

news.title: ‘The world needs you’
news.summary_en: UW–Madison celebrated the achievements and expertise of doctoral and professional graduates at Friday’s spring commencement.

news.title: Second fusion summit at UW signals the Midwest’s rise as a fusion powerhouse
news.summary_en: The event brought together researchers, industry leaders, government officials and investors to learn about and discuss fusion as a viable energy source.

news.title: Primatologist Karen Strier elected to the American Philosophical Society
news.summary_en: The highly selective distinction honors her more than four decades studying and working to protect an endangered monkey species.
